metadata.name: knight-startup
metadata.title: ⚔️ Welcome, Digital Knight - Establish Your Code of Honor

story.introduction: 🛡️ Hail and well met, Noble Knight! You stand as a protector of systems and guardian of proper procedures. Let's establish your code of honor.
story.context: Knights have responsibility for system protection, user assistance, and maintaining operational standards.
story.purpose: Configure protection protocols and service standards

variables.name: SERVICE-FOCUS
variables.prompt: How do you wish to serve the realm?
variables.help: This determines your primary responsibilities and available tools

variables.name: VIGILANCE-LEVEL
variables.prompt: How vigilantly should you monitor system health?
variables.help: Higher vigilance provides better protection but requires more attention

variables.name: ASSISTANCE-STYLE
variables.prompt: How do you prefer to assist other users?
variables.help: This configures your interaction style and notification preferences
